title: MES Platform
description: Standalone MES product (IoT Solutions): OEE, dispatch BPMN, quality SPC, ISA-88 batch lite, MES catalog folders and instance types. Install on a clean ISPF base — not included in the platform core.
changelog: 1.5.0 - BL-222 Nested BoM + operations dependency graph: BoM explosion/where-used, ready-operation BFF, Operator dashboard; 1.4.0 - BL-221 Traceability DAG v2; 1.3.0 - BL-164-168/170 Done evidence

Fix mes_bom_explode recursive NUMERIC cast for PostgreSQL
